cards.back: A distributed computing framework for processing large data sets

cards.front: What is the main advantage of using Hadoop over RDBMS?
cards.back: Hadoop is more cost-effective and can handle larger data sets

cards.front: What is the difference between Hadoop and RDBMS?
cards.back: Hadoop is a distributed system for big data, while RDBMS is a relational database for structured data

cards.front: What year was Hadoop first released?
What is the primary purpose of MapReduce in Hadoop?
cards.back: MapReduce is a programming model for processing large data sets in parallel, making it suitable for big data processing
